list.name: mil
list.label: Military
list.query: Any : any, Military : mil, Civil : civ

list.name: ac
list.label: Aircraft (trail)
list.query: SELECT a.registration || ' / ' || coalesce(a.icao_type,'?') || ' / ' || a.icao_hex AS __text, a.icao_hex AS __value FROM flights f JOIN aircraft a USING (icao_hex) WHERE f.start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR f.callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR a.registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR a.icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR a.operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (a.military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT a.military AND '${mil}' = 'civ')) GROUP BY a.icao_hex, a.registration, a.icao_type ORDER BY max(f.end_time) DESC LIMIT 500

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "Flights" FROM flights f JOIN aircraft a USING (icao_hex) WHERE f.start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR f.callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR a.registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR a.icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR a.operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (a.military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT a.military AND '${mil}' = 'civ'));

SELECT count(DISTINCT a.icao_hex) AS "Aircraft" FROM flights f JOIN aircraft a USING (icao_hex) WHERE f.start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR f.callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR a.registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR a.icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR a.operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (a.military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT a.military AND '${mil}' = 'civ'));

SELECT count(DISTINCT a.icao_hex) FILTER (WHERE a.military) AS "Military" FROM flights f JOIN aircraft a USING (icao_hex) WHERE f.start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR f.callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR a.registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR a.icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR a.operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (a.military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT a.military AND '${mil}' = 'civ'));

panels.title: Search results — one row per aircraft (click Registration to plot its trail)

targets.rawSql: SELECT a.registration, a.icao_type, a.operator, a.military, string_agg(DISTINCT f.callsign, ', ') AS callsigns, a.first_seen, a.last_seen, count(*) AS flights, a.icao_hex FROM flights f JOIN aircraft a USING (icao_hex) WHERE f.start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR f.callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR a.registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR a.icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR a.operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (a.military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT a.military AND '${mil}' = 'civ')) GROUP BY a.icao_hex, a.registration, a.icao_type, a.operator, a.military, a.first_seen, a.last_seen ORDER BY a.last_seen DESC LIMIT 1000;
SELECT time, lat AS latitude, lon AS longitude, alt_baro FROM positions WHERE icao_hex = ${ac:sqlstring} AND time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY time;

SELECT a.operator, count(DISTINCT a.icao_hex) AS aircraft, count(*) AS flights FROM flights f JOIN aircraft a USING (icao_hex) WHERE f.start_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND a.operator IS NOT NULL AND (${callsign:sqlstring} = '' OR f.callsign ILIKE '%' || ${callsign:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${registration:sqlstring} = '' OR a.registration ILIKE '%' || ${registration:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${type:sqlstring} = '' OR a.icao_type ILIKE '%' || ${type:sqlstring} || '%') AND (${operator:sqlstring} = '' OR a.operator ILIKE '%' || ${operator:sqlstring} || '%') AND ('${mil}' = 'any' OR (a.military AND '${mil}' = 'mil') OR (NOT a.military AND '${mil}' = 'civ')) GROUP BY a.operator ORDER BY flights DESC LIMIT 30;
